name: @wavex-os/cloud-client
description: HTTP clients for the WaveX OS Console edge functions: os-link-device, os-claim-device, os-device-token, os-device-refresh, os-inference, os-spend-intent. Reads/writes the device token bundle at ~/.wavex-os/device-token.json. Imported by Liaison + future tier-router + the wavex-os login CLI.
